cases.prompt: Zoom out — I'm lost in src/sync/journal.ts, how does this fit into the system?
Give me the big picture of the billing directory before I touch anything.
Survey the codebase for shallow modules and rank refactor candidates.
Write a haiku about autumn rain.
Teach me how the auth system works over several sessions, with quizzes along the way.
cases.notes: that's teach (ongoing learning record), not a one-off system-context explanation
